# Phuket Airport Fast Track — Complete Service Information

> Fast Track Phuket is the longest-operating VIP airport meet-and-assist service at Phuket International Airport (HKT), Thailand. Operating since 2013 with over 10,000 travelers served. We provide personal escort through immigration and customs, reducing wait times from 60+ minutes to under 5 minutes.

## About Us

Fast Track Phuket has been the trusted VIP airport service at Phuket International Airport (IATA: HKT) since 2013. We are an official VIP partner of HKT airport, specializing in meet-and-assist services for international travelers. Our team of experienced airport professionals processes travelers through immigration in under 5 minutes, compared to the standard 30-60+ minute wait in regular queues.

We operate daily from 06:00 to midnight, covering all international flights arriving at and departing from Phuket Airport. Our multilingual team speaks English, Thai, Russian, and Chinese, and our website is available in 10 languages.

## Service Packages

### Arrival Fast Track — from ฿1,600/person

What's included:
- Land and leave the airport in minutes
- Personal meet at gate or immigration zone
- Express immigration lane (priority window)
- Terminal guidance and exit assistance
- Flight delay coordination at no extra charge
- Chat support until service completion

Pricing:
- 1 passenger: ฿1,700
- 2+ passengers (group rate): ฿1,600 per person
- Children under 12: ฿850 (solo) / ฿800 (group) — 50% off
- Infants 0-2 years: FREE

### Departure VIP — from ฿1,700/person

What's included:
- Breeze through check-in and security
- Personal meet at terminal entrance
- Check-in assistance (if needed)
- Priority immigration and security screening
- Express passport control
- Gate escort and chat support

Pricing:
- 1 passenger: ฿1,800
- 2+ passengers (group rate): ฿1,700 per person
- Children under 12: ฿900 (solo) / ฿850 (group) — 50% off
- Infants 0-2 years: FREE

### Combo Package (Arrival + Departure) — BEST VALUE — from ฿3,100/person

What's included:
- Full arrival fast track service (all arrival benefits)
- Full departure VIP service (all departure benefits)
- Priority rebooking guarantee
- TDAC form assistance
- Dedicated WhatsApp support
- Flight delay coordination

Pricing:
- 1 passenger: ฿3,300
- 2+ passengers (group rate): ฿3,100 per person
- Children under 12: ฿1,650 (solo) / ฿1,550 (group) — 50% off
- Infants 0-2 years: FREE

All prices include official airport fees and taxes. Lowest price guarantee.

## VIP Fast Track vs. Regular Immigration at Phuket Airport

| Feature | Standard Way | VIP Fast Track |
|---------|-------------|----------------|
| Immigration Wait | 30-60+ minutes | Under 5 minutes |
| Personal Assistance | None (self-navigation) | Personal concierge (gate-to-exit) |
| Processing Lane | Standard public queues | Dedicated VIP fast-track lane |
| Flight Monitoring | None | Real-time arrival/departure tracking |
| Arrival/Departure Point | N/A | Aircraft bridge or terminal entrance |
| Document Support | No assistance | Full help with mandatory entry forms |
| Transfer Help | No | Taxi / driver coordination |

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What happens if my flight to Phuket is delayed?
We monitor all flights in real-time. If your flight is delayed, your VIP Fast Track escort adjusts their schedule automatically at no extra charge. In case of flight cancellation, you receive a full refund or free rebooking for your new flight date.

### Do I still need to fill out the Thailand TDAC form for 2026?
Yes, all international travelers must complete the Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) before arrival, regardless of Fast Track service. Our Phuket Airport Combo Package includes full TDAC assistance. We also provide a free step-by-step TDAC guide on our website.

### How far in advance should I book VIP Meet & Assist?
We recommend booking at least 24 hours before your flight for guaranteed availability. Same-day bookings may be available depending on current demand. During peak season in Phuket (November–March), booking 48–72 hours ahead is highly advisable to skip the 2-hour lines.

### Is Fast Track available for all airlines at Phuket Airport?
Yes, Fast Track service is available for all international flights at Phuket International Airport (HKT), operating daily from 06:00 to midnight. This covers all major airlines including Thai Airways, Bangkok Airways, AirAsia, Singapore Airlines, Qatar Airways, Emirates, and more.

### How fast is the VIP process?
Under 5 minutes compared to standard immigration waits of over 60 minutes.

### How will I find my professional concierge?
At the aircraft bridge (Arrivals) or Terminal entrance (Departures) holding a sign with your name.

### Do you help with mandatory Thai entry forms?
Yes, our team assists you in filling out all mandatory immigration and customs forms correctly.

## Payment Methods

We accept the following payment methods:
- Thai bank QR payment (THB)
- Online card payment (internet acquiring)
- USDT/USDC cryptocurrency (any network: TRC20, ERC20, BEP20, etc.)
- Cash via Bolt courier pickup (by arrangement)
- SWIFT international bank wire transfer

## Contact & Booking

- Website: https://fast-track-phuket.com/
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/66612345678
- Telegram: https://t.me/fasttrackphuket

## How to Book

1. Message us via WhatsApp or Telegram with your flight details
2. Receive booking confirmation and your escort's contact info
3. Your escort meets you at the agreed point (plane gate or terminal entrance)
4. Walk through express VIP lanes in under 5 minutes

## Our Team

- Kittipong — Service Manager: Coordinates VIP arrivals and handles complex logistics
- Nantana — Client Support: Personal concierge for international travelers
- Somchai — Airport Operations: Liaison with official immigration and customs authorities

Our experienced team has processed over 10,000 travelers at Phuket International Airport since 2013.
